description.p: 1984 is a cycle-stepped Amstrad CPC 464/6128 emulator written in C with SDL3. The core machine — Z80 CPU, MC6845 CRTC, AY-3-8912 PSG, uPD765 FDC, Gate Array, keyboard, joystick/gamepad and cassette tape — runs commercial games and standard software at full speed.

ul.li: DS12887 real-time clock (Cyboard / SYMBiFACE II compatible)
SYMBiFACE II / Cyboard IDE (raw disk images, FAT16/FAT32)
Albireo USB host (CH376) for UNIDOS and SymbOS

description.p: Cassette tape support (.cdt/TZX) with loading screech mixed into PSG audio; fullscreen letterbox gutter colour fix.
